startDisabled.enableRemote: Enable remote command listening in Settings first

setup.okSummary: Chromium is ready. Browser tools are available.
setup.nodeTooLow: Built-in Node version is too old. Please upgrade SpaceAssistant.
setup.cwdDescription: Open a terminal in this directory (the app install location)
setup.stepInstall: Install npm dependencies then continue with the Chromium step:
setup.detectPassed: All checks passed. Browser tools can be initialized.
setup.troubleshootNetworkBody: Installation downloads ~150–200MB. If using a proxy, make sure the terminal can reach cdn.playwright.dev.
setup.troubleshootDiskBody: Please ensure at least 500MB of free space.
setup.troubleshootStillFailBody: Click "Copy diagnostic info" and share the output for troubleshooting (no API Key included).
setup.troubleshootDefenderBody: Windows Defender may quarantine chrome.exe under %LOCALAPPDATA%\ms-playwright. Add an exclusion or allow it to run, then retry.
setup.troubleshootGatekeeperBody: The first Chromium launch may be blocked. Go to System Settings → Privacy & Security to allow it, or follow the Playwright docs to remove the quarantine attribute.
setup.troubleshootCacheMacBody: Playwright downloads browsers to ~/Library/Caches/ms-playwright/ by default.
setup.troubleshootCacheLinuxBody: Playwright downloads browsers to ~/.cache/ms-playwright/ by default.
